title: thalictrum minus var. procerum
intro: Thalictrum minus var. procerum, also known as the dwarf meadow rue or small meadow rue, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe and protect wounds, as well as reduce swelling and pain. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Thalictrum minus var. procerum can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and effective natural treatment for a range of health concerns.
